summary: Added a brief Monday-afternoon opening anchor so the detention scene lands as the immediate consequence of the academic slippage established at the end of chapter 13. No exit change was needed; the existing close already hands cleanly into chapter 15's next-morning Great Hall opening.

Left the chapter ending structurally unchanged because the overnight gap already supports the chapter 15 handoff.
